text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 146 

INCREASED_ICL 

LABEL: Indicates Whether Part D Plan Offers Increased Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan offers reduced cost sharing in the ICL phase by offering an ICL 
that is higher than the year's predefined standard ICL amount. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 
9 =
